# Pre-collaboration checklist (RISK_REGISTER §20 mechanism)

Run BEFORE any tool, bot, platform, token project, broker, or creator
collaboration is agreed to or announced. All boxes must pass or the collab
does not happen. Log every run in the table below, including rejections.

- [ ] **Compensation disclosed internally:** is ANY payment, token grant,
      affiliate cut, free access, or in-kind benefit involved? If yes →
      §17(b) anti-touting + FTC material-connection territory: public
      disclosure REQUIRED using DISCLOSURE_BLOCK.md §B, top of content.
- [ ] **No signals adjacency:** the partner does not sell signals, copy-trade
      products, or "VIP calls" — and never has under another brand. (Check
      docs/SIGNALS_LANDSCAPE.md.) Any history → reject, no exceptions.
- [ ] **No CTA/RIA adjacency:** featuring the partner cannot be read as the
      org recommending their trading guidance. Tools = mechanics-only framing.
- [ ] **Token rule (§20):** if a token is involved in any way, content stays
      mechanics-only, never evaluative; no price talk, no "potential."
- [ ] **Education posture survives:** the collab output passes the
      education-not-advice filter (CONTENT_CALENDAR checklist) verbatim.
- [ ] **Earnings-claims check (§17):** nothing in the partner's materials we
      amplify contains income/win-rate claims.
- [ ] **Exit clause:** we can terminate and remove co-branded content
      unilaterally if the partner drifts.

## Log
